summary: Alley Boss finalizes the plans for his new show, 'King of Masked Combat,' a high-stakes PvP tournament where masked participants compete for the throne. The show attracts significant interest from pro players and famous streamers, including Hanbaek from JT Telecom, who maneuvers to secure a spot. Meanwhile, news reaches Alley Boss about an online community rumor involving an odd encounter with an orc named Cancun in the Frozen Canyon, prompting him to investigate the location with his companions.
key_moments: Alley Boss establishes the dramatic rules and format for his new show, 'King of Masked Combat.'
Pro players and guild members express intense interest in joining the show, with Hanbaek successfully lobbying to participate.
Alley Boss receives positive updates regarding the show's casting while discovering community posts about an orc named Cancun in the Frozen Canyon.
Alley Boss and his group travel to the Frozen Canyon to search for Cancun, treating the endeavor as content for his channel.
